title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
